summary: Fast, accurate STT for production-grade voice agents Discussion | Link
content: Introducing Parrot: Ringg’s speech-to-text model for production-grade voice agents. Capture Hindi-heavy and noisy real-world conversations with low-latency inference, stronger transcript quality, and Hindi validation built for downstream workflows.
chineseSummary: 适用于生产级语音代理的快速、准确的 STT 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Parrot 简介：Ringg 的用于生产级语音代理的语音到文本模型。通过低延迟推理、更强的转录质量以及为下游工作流程构建的印地语验证来捕获印地语密集且嘈杂的现实世界对话。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
